commit.message:
Rename package from com.notification to org.notification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Grafana dashboard by setting datasource UID and enabling histogram metrics

Dashboard panels referenced datasource uid "prometheus" but the
provisioned datasource had no explicit UID. Also enabled percentiles
histogram for HTTP server requests so p95/p99 latency panels have data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Redis cache serialization by using JSON instead of JDK serializer

The default JdkSerializationRedisSerializer requires cached objects to
implement Serializable. Entity classes (User, Device, NotificationTemplate)
don't, causing every @Cacheable call to fail with SerializationException
and resulting in 100% load test failures. Switch to
GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer. Also promote load-client error
logging from DEBUG to ERROR for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace wildcard imports with explicit single-class imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add healthcheck to notification-server for load-client readiness

The load-client was starting before the notification-server Spring Boot
app was ready, causing 100% request failures. Use actuator health
endpoint as healthcheck and require service_healthy condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

Each Dockerfile was copying the shared settings.gradle which references
all subprojects, but only one subproject's source was available during
build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: add 6 safety/quality features from library migration learnings

1. TMDB mismatch warnings — flags when matched title differs significantly
   from parsed title using word-overlap similarity with simple stemming
2. Truncated file detection — warns when files are suspiciously small for
   their claimed resolution (e.g. 50MB "1080p" file)
3. Duplicate detection — warns when destination folder already has video files
4. Configurable probe timeout — --probe-timeout flag (default 30s) for NAS use
5. Collection splitting — detects directories with multiple distinct movies
   and processes each individually instead of inheriting folder title
6. TV folder consolidation — detects duplicate TV show folders with different
   naming (e.g. "Breaking.Bad.S01" vs "Breaking Bad") and reports them

All warnings are displayed inline per-file and summarized at the end of a run.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use streaming to measure TTFT in vLLM benchmarks

- Now properly measures Time To First Token (TTFT)
- Uses streaming mode to capture first token arrival
- Accurate tokens/second calculation
- 5 minute timeout for long generations

commit.message:
Docs/rag engine plugin architecture (#82)

* docs: update wiki for RAG engine plugin architecture

Replace KnowledgeRetriever component docs with RAGEngine across all
three languages (zh/en/ja). Key changes:

- Add new rag-engine.mdx component docs covering RAGEngine base class,
  creation_schema/retrieval_schema, capability declarations, lifecycle
  hooks, host RAG APIs, and complete code examples
- Update knowledge base usage docs to reflect unified KB model (remove
  internal/external distinction, add RAG engine selection flow)
- Update component list (add.mdx) and plugin intro to reference RAGEngine
- Add RAG API section to plugin common APIs (invoke_embedding,
  vector_upsert/search/delete, get_rag_file_stream)
- Update docs.json navigation to point to rag-engine pages

Companion to LangBot PR #1995 and SDK PR #34.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: sync with sdk

* docs: update vector API docs with metadata filters, search_type, and documents support

- Replace Warning tags about unimplemented filters with Info tags documenting
  canonical filter format (Chroma-style where syntax) and supported operators
- Document search_type/query_text params for full-text and hybrid search
- Document documents param for vector_upsert
- Update RetrievalContext.filters description from reserved to active
- Add filter usage examples (en/zh/ja)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: enhance RAG Engine documentation across multiple languages

- Expanded the description of the RAG Engine component to include bridging capabilities with advanced knowledge base services like Dify, RAGFlow, and FastGPT.
- Clarified the `DOC_INGESTION` capability description, specifying conditions under which the declaration can be omitted.
- Updated documentation in English, Japanese, and Chinese to ensure consistency and clarity.

* docs: add instructions for show_if conditional rendering

* docs: add Parser component documentation (zh/en/ja)

Add Parser as a new component type in plugin docs. Parser extracts
structured text from binary files (PDF, Word, etc.) before RAG engine
ingestion. Includes manifest format, parse method API, data models
(ParseContext/ParseResult/TextSection), RAGEngine integration via
parsed_content, and cross-plugin invoke_parser API.

Also add DOC_PARSING capability to RAG engine docs and parsed_content
field to IngestionContext.

Companion to SDK PR langbot-app/langbot-plugin-sdk#37 and
LangBot PR langbot-app/LangBot#2000.

* refactor: change rag engine to knowledge engine

chore: configurar WARP proxy mode + GOST + proxychains4

workflow:

- GOST converte SOCKS5→HTTP em :8080 (para ffmpeg A ler HLS)
- proxychains4 configurado com WARP :40000 (para ffmpeg B enviar RTMP)
- instala xvfb, proxychains4, gost
- remove Deno (não usado pelo runner)

main.js:
- ffmpeg B (encoder) spawna via proxychains4 -q

setup.sh:
- adiciona xvfb, gost

commit.message:
Fix budget chart y-axis: group by (annual_hours, scenario) not annual_hours alone

The previous groupby("annual_hours") summed both scenarios together, doubling
the stacked bar height used to compute y_max/y_min. Now groups by
(annual_hours, scenario) and takes the per-scenario stack max/min, then also
includes the net_income dashed line in the upper bound. Both Baseline and
With Subsidy charts now share a correctly scaled, consistent y-axis.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add USD cost estimation based on official model pricing

pricing.rs: lookup table for Claude and OpenAI models (March 2026)
  - Claude: Opus/Sonnet/Haiku 4.x, prefix-matched; cache_write + cache_read
    rates from official docs (1.25x and 0.10x of input respectively)
  - OpenAI: gpt-4o, gpt-4.1, o3, o4-mini, gpt-5.x; prefix fallback covers
    unreleased variants (e.g. gpt-5.4 → gpt-5 pricing)

Parsing changes:
  - TokenUsage gains cache_write_tokens, cost_usd, unknown_cost_sessions
  - claude.rs: cost computed per message using message.model; skips <synthetic>
  - codex.rs: model read from turn_context (not session_meta); cost uses
    cumulative total_token_usage with cached/non-cached split

Display: adds "Estimated cost (USD)" row; marks partial unknowns with *;
shows footnote when any sessions had unrecognised model pricing.

39 tests passing.

commit.message:
Parser: add indentation validation pass for match arm bodies

Walk the AST after parsing to check that match arm bodies are indented
past their 'when' keyword. Single-line arms are always OK. Adds Line/Col
position info to If, Let, LetPat, LetRec, Match AST nodes and BodyLine/
BodyCol to MatchArm for precise error reporting.

Also adds scripts/test-all.sh, wires it into `make test`, and fixes
Makefile to include Json/Decode.rex in the test run.

commit.message:
Release v1.4.1: feature parity (SSH desktop, duplicate, PIN generate, vault key SFTP, category delete)

- Desktop: SSH key management panel with generation (ED25519/RSA) and PEM import
- Desktop: SSH key entry dialog for CRUD operations
- Desktop: SFTP authentication via vault-stored SSH key (CardLayout source selector)
- Desktop: category deletion with entry reassignment
- Desktop: duplicate entry for applications (AppPanel context menu)
- Android: duplicate entry for passwords and applications (detail screen button)
- Android: PIN generation button in app edit screen (4-6 random digits)
- Core: SshKeyService with search on title/type/fingerprint
- Core: AppConfig sftpVaultKeyId field for vault key SFTP
- Core: SFTPRepository byte-array key constructor
- Core: SyncService vault key bytes support
- Updated README.md, FUNCTIONAL.md, TECHNICAL.md for all changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Simplify school view to 2-level structure and fix Past Sales modal

Major Changes:
- Simplify nested school view from 3 levels to 2 levels
- Fix Past Sales modal showing same data for all product variations

School View Simplification:
- Remove intermediate product grouping layer
- Structure now: School → Variations (SKUs directly)
- Show all SKU variations directly when school is expanded
- Display format: Product Name | SKU | Size | Stock | Incoming | Forecast | Gap
- Updated "Products" column to "Variations" with variation count

Backend (views.py):
- Remove product grouping logic from school view (lines 2294-2420)
- Create flat variation list directly under each school
- Change data structure to return 'variations' array instead of 'products'
- Return 'variation_count' instead of 'product_count'
- Sort variations by product name then size

Frontend (sales_forecasting.html):
- Remove intermediate product parent rows
- Simplify nested table to show variations directly
- Remove product-level click handlers and JavaScript
- Update table headers to show "Variations" column
- Clean up CSS (remove product-parent-row styles)
- Remove ~100 lines of template code

Past Sales Modal Fix (views.py):
- Change from filtering by style_code to filtering by specific SKU code
- Fix: was showing aggregated sales for all variations (all sizes)
- Now: shows sales history for the specific SKU clicked
- Simplified SQL queries (removed unnecessary JOINs)
- Filter by soli.code instead of p.style_code in all queries

Benefits:
- Faster page load (one less nesting level)
- Simpler user interaction (one click to see all SKUs)
- Cleaner codebase (~93 lines removed)
- Better data visibility (all variations visible immediately)
- Accurate Past Sales data (per-SKU instead of aggregated)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) - users can input their own API key

- Key icon button (bottom-left) opens API key modal
- User pastes their Anthropic API key (sk-ant-...)
- Key is validated with a test request before activation
- Stored in sessionStorage only (disappears when tab closes)
- Calls Anthropic API directly from browser when user key is set
- Falls back to server proxy or fakeReply when no key
- Green indicator when AI is connected
- Multi-language support (IT/EN/DA/SV)
- REMOVE button to disconnect and go back to automatic replies
